flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Cottey College rose 59% between 2017 and 2020 ($12.0k → $19.0k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Cottey College fell 48% between 2021 and 2024 (60.9% → 31.8%).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Cottey College rose 19% between 2021 and 2024 ($23.1k → $27.6k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Cottey College rose 19% between 2006 and 2009 ($12.2k → $14.5k).
